# Security Threat Response Workbench

Purpose: threat response workbench with scenario board, runbooks, indicators, and snapshot reports
Free entry point: public synthetic threat-response demo
Paid boundary: paid private scenario workspace and recurring threat exercise report
Canonical URL: https://security-threat-response-workbench.ehdjs1351.workers.dev/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/security-threat-response-workbench
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/security-threat-response-workbench/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/security-threat-response-workbench/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: https://github.com/KIM3310/security-threat-response-workbench/issues/new?template=service-inquiry.yml&title=Private+workspace+inquiry%3A+Security+Threat+Response+Workbench

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for Security Threat Response Workbench demo, Security Threat Response Workbench system architecture, Security Threat Response Workbench security tool, threat response workbench with scenario board, runbooks, indicators, and snapshot reports service.
